documentation:
## Aliyun ROS ASM Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as ASM from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-asm';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.__init__
documentation:
---
param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'
param id: '- scoped id of the resource.'
param props: '- resource properties.'
param scope: '- scope in which this resource is defined.'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh._render_properties
documentation:
---
param props: '-'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.attr_service_mesh_id
documentation: :Attribute: ServiceMeshId: The ID of the ASM instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.vpc_id
documentation: :Property: vpcId: The ID of the virtual private cloud (VPC).

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.v_switches
documentation: :Property: vSwitches: The ID of the vSwitch, eg: ["vsw-xzegf5dndkbf4m6eg****"]

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.api_server_public_eip
documentation:
:Property:

apiServerPublicEip: Specifies whether to expose the API server to the Internet.
Valid values: true and false. Default value: false.
If you do not set this parameter, the API server of clusters added to the ASM instance
cannot be accessed from the Internet.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.audit_project
documentation:
:Property:

auditProject: The name of the Log Service project that is used for mesh audit.
Default value: mesh-log-{meshId}.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.customized_zipkin
documentation: :Property: customizedZipkin: Specifies whether to use a user-created Zipkin system.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.enable_audit
documentation:
:Property:

enableAudit: Specifies whether to enable the mesh audit feature. To enable this feature, make sure
that you have activated Alibaba Cloud Log Service.
Valid values: true and false. Default value: false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.include_ip_ranges
documentation:
:Property:

includeIpRanges: The Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) block in the ASM instance that are denied
to access external services.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.istio_version
documentation: :Property: istioVersion: The Istio version of the ASM instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.locality_load_balancing
documentation:
:Property:

localityLoadBalancing: Specifies whether to route traffic to the nearest instance.
Valid values: true and false. Default value: false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.name
documentation: :Property: name: The name of the ASM instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.opa
documentation: :Property: opa: OPA settings.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.outbound_traffic_policy
documentation: :Property: outboundTrafficPolicy: The outbound traffic policy of the ASM instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.pilot_public_eip
documentation:
:Property:

pilotPublicEip: Specifies whether to expose Istio Pilot to the Internet.
Valid values: true and false. Default value: false.
If you do not set this parameter, only clusters in the same VPC as the ASM instance
can access Istio Pilot of the instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.proxy
documentation: :Property: proxy: Proxy settings.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.telemetry
documentation: :Property: telemetry: Specifies whether to enable Prometheus monitoring. We recommend that you use Application Real-Time Monitoring Service (ARMS).

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.trace_sampling
documentation: :Property: traceSampling: The sampling percentage of tracing.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.tracing
documentation:
:Property:

tracing: Specifies whether to enable the tracing feature. To enable this feature, make sure
that you have activated Alibaba Cloud Tracing Analysis.
Valid values: true and false. Default value: false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.OPAProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param opa_limit_cpu: true
param opa_limit_memory: true
param opa_log_level: true
param opa_request_cpu: true
param opa_request_memory: true
param open_agent_policy: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.OPAProperty.opa_limit_cpu
documentation: :Property: opaLimitCpu: The limit on the CPU of the OPA container.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.OPAProperty.opa_limit_memory
documentation: :Property: opaLimitMemory: The limit on the memory size of the OPA container.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.OPAProperty.opa_log_level
documentation: :Property: opaLogLevel: The log level of the OPA container.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.OPAProperty.opa_request_cpu
documentation: :Property: opaRequestCpu: The number of CPU cores requested by the OPA container.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.OPAProperty.opa_request_memory
documentation: :Property: opaRequestMemory: The size of the memory requested by the OPA container.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.OPAProperty.open_agent_policy
documentation:
:Property:

openAgentPolicy: Specifies whether to enable the Open Policy Agent (OPA) plug-in.
Valid values: true and false. Default value: false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.ProxyProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param cluster_domain: true
param proxy_limit_cpu: true
param proxy_limit_memory: true
param proxy_request_cpu: true
param proxy_request_memory: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.ProxyProperty.cluster_domain
documentation: :Property: clusterDomain: The domain name of the cluster.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.ProxyProperty.proxy_limit_cpu
documentation: :Property: proxyLimitCpu: The limit on the CPU of the sidecar.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.ProxyProperty.proxy_limit_memory
documentation: :Property: proxyLimitMemory: The limit on the memory size of the sidecar.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.ProxyProperty.proxy_request_cpu
documentation: :Property: proxyRequestCpu: The number of CPU cores requested by the sidecar.

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.RosServiceMesh.ProxyProperty.proxy_request_memory
documentation: :Property: proxyRequestMemory: The size of the memory requested by the sidecar.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ASM::ServiceMesh`, which is used to create a Service Mesh (ASM) instance.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `ServiceMesh` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-asm-servicemesh>

classes.name: ros_cdk_asm.ServiceMesh

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.ServiceMesh.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.ServiceMesh.attr_service_mesh_id
documentation: Attribute ServiceMeshId: The ID of the ASM instance.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ASM::ServiceMesh`, which is used to create a Service Mesh (ASM) instance.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosServiceMesh\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-asm-servicemesh>

methods.name: ros_cdk_asm.ServiceMeshProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `ServiceMesh`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-asm-servicemesh>

```
param vpc_id

Property vpcId: The ID of the virtual private cloud (VPC).

param v_switches

Property vSwitches: The ID of the vSwitch, eg: ["vsw-xzegf5dndkbf4m6eg****"].

param api_server_public_eip

Property apiServerPublicEip: Specifies whether to expose the API server to the Internet. Valid values: true and false. Default value: false. If you do not set this parameter, the API server of clusters added to the ASM instance cannot be accessed from the Internet.

param audit_project

Property auditProject: The name of the Log Service project that is used for mesh audit. Default value: mesh-log-{meshId}.

param customized_zipkin

Property customizedZipkin: Specifies whether to use a user-created Zipkin system.

param enable_audit

Property enableAudit: Specifies whether to enable the mesh audit feature. To enable this feature, make sure that you have activated Alibaba Cloud Log Service. Valid values: true and false. Default value: false.

param include_ip_ranges

Property includeIpRanges: The Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) block in the ASM instance that are denied to access external services.

param istio_version

Property istioVersion: The Istio version of the ASM instance.

param locality_load_balancing

Property localityLoadBalancing: Specifies whether to route traffic to the nearest instance. Valid values: true and false. Default value: false.

param name

Property name: The name of the ASM instance.

param opa

Property opa: OPA settings.

param outbound_traffic_policy

Property outboundTrafficPolicy: The outbound traffic policy of the ASM instance.

param pilot_public_eip

Property pilotPublicEip: Specifies whether to expose Istio Pilot to the Internet. Valid values: true and false. Default value: false. If you do not set this parameter, only clusters in the same VPC as the ASM instance can access Istio Pilot of the instance.

param proxy

Property proxy: Proxy settings.

param telemetry

Property telemetry: Specifies whether to enable Prometheus monitoring. We recommend that you use Application Real-Time Monitoring Service (ARMS).

param trace_sampling

Property traceSampling: The sampling percentage of tracing.

param tracing

Property tracing: Specifies whether to enable the tracing feature. To enable this feature, make sure that you have activated Alibaba Cloud Tracing Analysis. Valid values: true and false. Default value: false.
```
